body.title: [sprint] Store layout vs reality: design_patterns/ empty (inventory in docs/), sessions/ empty but referenced
body.description:
intention: I intend that the declared store layout and the actual artifact homes agree, so the layout teaches a fresh builder the truth.

rebuildability-diff.20260707.md F4: devlab/runtime/memory/design_patterns/ is empty while the live 22-pattern inventory sits at docs/design_patterns_inventory.md (a second home for a store-typed artifact — the drift the one-home rule prohibits); sessions/ is empty while /sorted references session records. Resolve each: either move the artifact into the store subdir (and repoint pre_inference_assemble.py's inventory path) or amend the canonical-layout decision to remove/rename the subdir. Do NOT leave a silent divergence.

**Affected files:** devlab/runtime/memory/design_patterns/ or docs/design_patterns_inventory.md + devlab/claudecode/pre_inference_assemble.py (path repoint), skills/sorted/SKILL.md (session-record reference), possibly a layout-amendment note on D-canonical-memory-consolidation-2026-06-23

**Design rules:** one home, no exceptions; delete old copies after successful merge

**Scope boundary:** reconcile these two subdirs only; not a general store audit.

**Test plan:** if inventory moves: pre_inference_assemble.py still matches patterns (run on a known ticket, non-empty MATCHED DESIGN PATTERNS); if layout amended: grep shows no skill references the removed subdir.

**Completion criteria:** both subdirs either populated-and-referenced or removed-and-unreferenced; zero references to the losing path.

**Validation:** the assemble-script run output or the zero-reference grep.

audit-emphasis: none

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.intention: I intend that the declared store layout and the actual artifact homes agree, so the layout teaches a fresh builder the truth.
